meaning: n.生活在陆上的人,乡下人,农夫,(尤指为取得钻探权的)租地人
examples: Farmers occasionally plow up landman relics.
It's nutty right now, " said one landman, Derrick Palmer, "but it's nutty in a good way. "
For Landman, the relative calm in the aftermath of the Malema affair reflects the reality of the new South Africa.
